settings.tagline: Full-grain hide. Hardware that outlasts the leather.
settings.features_title: Built to last. Made to be noticed.
settings.material_body: We source only full-grain Italian leather — the highest grade available. Unlike corrected-grain leather that is sanded and painted over imperfections, ours shows the natural texture of the hide. It starts supple, and only gets better with every walk.

settings.title: About This Collar
settings.value_2: Stainless steel D-ring & buckle — no plating, no rust

settings.title: Neck Size Guide
settings.hint: Measure neck with soft tape. Add 2cm for comfort.
settings.table_html:
SizeNeckFits breed
XS20–28cmChihuahua, Pomeranian
S28–36cmFrench Bulldog, Shih Tzu
M36–44cmCavoodle, Cocker Spaniel
L44–52cmLabrador, Border Collie
XL52–60cmGerman Shepherd, Rottweiler

settings.title: Shipping & Returns
settings.content:
Free worldwide shipping on all orders. Express available at checkout.

Free 30-day returns on all non-personalised items. Items must be unworn and in original packaging.

settings.title: Care Instructions
settings.content: Wipe clean with a damp cloth after muddy walks. Condition with leather balm every 3 months to maintain suppleness. Avoid prolonged submersion in water. Do not machine wash.

settings.name: Full-Grain Leather
settings.description: Vegetable-tanned Italian hide — the highest grade. Shows the natural grain. Develops a rich patina with use.

settings.name: Multiple Sizes
settings.description: XS through XL — five sizes with multiple adjustment points. One collar fits every breed.

settings.name: Stainless Steel Hardware
settings.description: Anti-rust D-ring, buckle, and keeper. Hardware built to outlast the leather it sits on.

settings.text: I've never seen my dog get this excited. The quality feels incredible — super durable and looks beautiful. It's rare to find pet products that are both functional and this stylish. PAWD nailed it.
settings.author: Olivia M.

settings.text: The personalised collar is the prettiest I've ever seen. The stitching, the softness, the engraving — all of it feels so intentional. Worth every cent and more.
settings.author: Jack L.
